zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Pierrepont於1129年出生在英國素可阿書爾斯特時，他的父親Hugues DE MONTFELIX19歲，母親Aélide DE PIERREPONT-DE MONTAIGU19歲。他於大約1150年與Clemence Rethel在英國素可賀爾斯皮爾波特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1188年在英國英格蘭享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 易普斯維其。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pierrepont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Pierrepont was born in 1129, in Ashurst, Sussex, England, his father, Hugues DE MONTFELIX, was 19 and his mother, Aélide DE PIERREPONT-DE MONTAIGU, was 19. He married Clemence Rethel about 1150, in Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1188, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Pierrepont est né en 1129, à Ashurst, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Hugues DE MONTFELIX, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Aélide DE PIERREPONT-DE MONTAIGU, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Clemence Rethel environ 1150, à Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1188, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stoke Neyland Church, County Suffolk, En: Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Pierrepont 1129 in Ashurst, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues DE MONTFELIX 19 und seine Mutter Aélide DE PIERREPONT-DE MONTAIGU 19. Er hat um 1150 in Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, England Clemence Rethel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1188 im Alter von 60 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Clemence Rethel circa 1150, nel Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1188, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Pierrepontが1129年にイギリススセックスアシュルストで生まれた時，父Hugues DE MONTFELIXは19歳，母Aélide DE PIERREPONT-DE MONTAIGUは19歳であった。約1150年にイギリススセックスハルストパエルプオイントでClemence Rethelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1188年にイギリスイギリスで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー イプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.Stoke Neyland Church, County Suffolk, En: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Pierrepont(이)가 1129년 영국 수세스 애슈르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues DE MONTFELIX(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Aélide DE PIERREPONT-DE MONTAIGU(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 영국 수세스 허스트피르포인트에서 Clemence Rethel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1188년 영국 잉글랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Pierrepont nasceu em 1129, em Ashurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugues DE MONTFELIX, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Aélide DE PIERREPONT-DE MONTAIGU, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Clemence Rethel aproximadamente 1150, em Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1188, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stoke Neyland Church, County Suffolk, En: сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Pierrepont родился в 1129 г. в местности ашурст, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugues DE MONTFELIX было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Aélide DE PIERREPONT-DE MONTAIGU, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Clemence Rethel около 1150 г. в местности хурстпьирпоинт, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1188 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
